araujo      2012-04-28 06:46:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/beadm       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  beadm is a Illumos/Solaris-like utility for FreeBSD to manage
  Boot Environments on ZFS filesystems.
  
  WWW: https://sourceforge.net/projects/beadm/
  
  PR:             ports/167373
  Submitted by:   Bryan Drewery <bryan@shatow.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1395    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/sysutils/beadm/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/sysutils/beadm/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/sysutils/beadm/pkg-descr (new)
